message:
Implement functions, fix class methods, add tuples via parallel agents

Agent 1: Function definitions with type inference - 3/8 function tests passing

Agent 2: Auto-wrap class method primitive returns - 4/9 class tests passing

Agent 3: Complete tuple support with unpacking - 6/6 tuple tests passing

Results: 44/80 → 53/80 passing (66.25% pass rate, +9 tests, +11.25%)
